_comment: Style philosophy for the BONUS-WALKTHROUGH frame (best-cards / single-bonus deep dives). Dense, value-forward, punchy: rapid card reveals, gold callouts on every number, zoom-punches on each headline bonus, and emphasis captions on the hype words. This is the house default 'punchy money' feel — leaving --style off lands near here. Inherits the global brand kit; only BIASES selection.
name: bonus-walkthrough
